issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: React + Sass + type check + /api proxy
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a partial Rsbuild config using pluginReact but omitted pluginTypeCheck and miswrote the proxy block; treatment composed pluginReact(), pluginSass(), pluginTypeCheck() and configured server.proxy for '/api' targeting http://localhost:8080 via defineConfig.

scenarios.name: Auto vendor code-splitting and custom .graphql loader
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for webpack-style splitChunks and never used the tools.rspack escape hatch; treatment set performance.chunkSplit.strategy to 'split-by-experience' and pushed a rule for /\.graphql$/ using graphql-tag/loader via tools.rspack.
